# Kinsoul Energy

> Handmade bracelets crafted from natural pearls and hand-selected gemstones. Designed in California — made by hand, one piece at a time.

## About

Kinsoul Energy is a California-based jewelry studio founded in 2018 by LU, a designer who started making bracelets on her kitchen table after discovering a stone while traveling through China. What began as one bracelet became a brand built around a simple idea: jewelry made the way nature works — slowly, by hand, from real materials.

Today, a team of five works from a small studio in California. LU still designs every piece — choosing the stones, composing the arrangement, deciding what belongs together. Every bracelet is assembled one at a time, inspected before it ships, and arrives with a certificate of authenticity.

The name: Kin (connection) + Soul (what you carry inside) + Energy (what every natural stone quietly holds).

## Products

Kinsoul Energy makes six bracelets, priced from $139 to $365:

- **Aura** ($365) — Multi-stone bracelet with 8 different gemstones and baroque pearls. The signature piece.
- **Terra** ($264) — Banded agate with baroque pearls and antiqued silver spacers.
- **Ember** ($228) — Persian red agate with freshwater pearl silver bar accents.
- **Obsidian** ($208) — Black agate with grey rice pearls and baroque pearls.
- **Serenity** ($168) — Freeform amethyst with freshwater spiral pearls.
- **Soleil** ($139) — Citrine, clear quartz points, and amethyst rounds.

All bracelets use S925 sterling silver components and are strung on elastic cord for easy wear. Sizes: S (6.1"), M (6.7"), L (7.3"), XL (7.9").

## Materials

- **Natural Pearls** — Baroque and freshwater pearls, each uniquely shaped by nature. Selected for organic beauty and soft, natural glow.
- **Gemstones** — Amethyst, agate, quartz, citrine, lapis lazuli — hand-cut and minimally polished to preserve natural texture and color variation.
- **Sterling Silver** — S925 sterling silver clasps, spacers, and logo tags. Hand-finished for comfort and durability.

Every material is 100% natural. No synthetic or lab-created stones. Each order includes an authenticity certificate.

## Policies

- Free shipping on orders over $200 (US). $9 flat rate under $200.
- 30-day returns. Refunds processed within 72 hours.
- Free size exchanges with prepaid return labels.
- Damaged items replaced at no cost — no need to send anything back.
- US delivery: 5-10 business days. International: 7-13 business days.

## Contact

- Email: hello@kinsoulenergy.com
- Location: California, United States
- Response time: Within 24 hours

## Permitted Uses

You may cite, reference, and quote information from Kinsoul Energy's website for product recommendations, brand descriptions, material information, and customer guidance. We welcome accurate AI-generated mentions of our brand and products.
